digest.en: The US has issued more Iran sanctions on the eve of possible talks in Pakistan. Trump extended the ceasefire until Iran submits a proposal. Pakistan's role in brokering a US-Iran peace is being watched by its citizens for potential domestic gains.
digest.hi: रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने जर्मनी में होर्मुज जलसंधि में बढ़ती अस्थिरता को लेकर चिंता जताई है। इसका भारत पर सीधा असर पड़ सकता है। वहीं, अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने ईरान के साथ संघर्ष विराम बढ़ाया है।

articles.title: US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan
articles.summary: The US issued sanctions on 14 Iranian individuals and entities. The Trump administration targets 14 individuals and entities over alleged links to Iran's arms industry. US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iran submits proposal
articles.summary: Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran until a proposal is submitted. The move came after an Iranian commander threatened to destroy the region's oil industry. An Iranian commander had threatened to destroy the region's oil industry if war resumed with the U. S.

articles.title: Trump says the US will extend its ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request
articles.summary: The US extended its ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan's request. The blockade of Iranian ports will continue. The US president said the United States will extend its ceasefire with Iran at Pakistan’s request and continue the blockade of Iranian ports.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted, talks are over
articles.summary: Trump extended the ceasefire until Iran submits a unified proposal. Pakistan requested the move to allow Iranian leaders to come up with a proposal. The U. S. President ⁠said he was acting at the request of ​Pakistan to ‌hold off attacks until Iranian leaders and representatives could come ‌up with what ​he called a unified proposal.

articles.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue
articles.summary: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until a proposal is submitted. The Hormuz blockade will continue. Trump says extending ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted and discussions are concluded. Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue.

articles.title: Fired U.K. Official Describes ‘Pressure’ to Expedite Envoy’s Appointment
articles.summary: A fired UK official described pressure to expedite Peter Mandelson's appointment as ambassador to Washington. Mandelson is a Jeffrey Epstein associate. Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office wanted Peter Mandelson, a Jeffrey Epstein associate, swiftly installed as ambassador to Washington, the official said.

articles.title: EU eyes options as Iran conflict threatens jet fuel shortages
articles.summary: Europe faces jet fuel shortages due to the Hormuz blockade. Imports are heavily relied upon. The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is causing concern in Europe, which relies heavily on imported jet fuel.

articles.title: Sudan refugees returning home face new ‘struggle for survival’: UN
articles.summary: Sudanese returnees face damaged homes and limited access to water and healthcare. Returnees find chronic need for investment with homes, water supplies, health provision, electricity 'heavily damaged'. Sudan refugees returning home face new ‘struggle for survival’: UN.

articles.title: Trump announces Iran ceasefire extension but says blockade remains
articles.summary: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until leaders propose a unified plan to end the war. US president says attacks will be held off until Iranian leaders 'come up with a unified proposal' to end war.

articles.title: Germany, Italy block bid to suspend EU-Israel trade agreement
articles.summary: Germany and Italy blocked the EU from suspending its association agreement with Israel. The move halted a proposed suspension. Germany and Italy have blocked the European Union from suspending the bloc’s association agreement with Israel.

articles.title: Trump extends ceasefire in Iran, citing 'seriously fractured' Iranian government
articles.summary: Trump extended a ceasefire in Iran citing a fractured government. The extension was announced by Trump. Trump extends ceasefire in Iran, citing 'seriously fractured' Iranian government CNBC.

articles.title: As Pakistan seeks to broker U.S.–Iran peace, citizens watch for gains at home
articles.summary: Pakistan is brokering peace between the US and Iran. Many Pakistanis are watching for improvements at home as a result of the diplomatic efforts. As Pakistan works to broker peace between the U. S.

articles.title: What would happen next if Iran agreed to surrender its highly enriched uranium
articles.summary: The US might move highly enriched uranium out of Iran if it agrees to surrender the material, according to Scott Roecker of the Nuclear Threat Initiative. The process would involve negotiations on verification and logistics.

articles.title: U.S. Turns Up Pressure on Iraq to Distance Itself From Iran
articles.summary: The US is pressuring Iraq to dismantle Iran-backed militias. These militias have attacked Americans and US sites. Washington is demanding that the Baghdad government dismantle Iran-backed Iraqi militias that have been attacking Americans and U. S.

articles.title: Trump’s US Fed nominee Warsh vows independence, says he’s no ‘sock puppet’
articles.summary: Kevin Warsh, Trump's nominee for the US Fed, vowed independence during his confirmation hearing. He denied being a "sock puppet" amid doubts over his impartiality. Kevin Warsh's confirmation hearing shines spotlight on doubts over his independence as Trump pushes again for rate cuts.

articles.title: Iran threatens To End Gulf Nations' Oil Production As Truce Deadline Nears
articles.summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guards threatened to end Gulf nations' oil production. The threat was made as a truce deadline nears. Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Tuesday threatened to end oil production in the Middle East if the Islamic republic faced attacks launched from its Gulf neighbours' territory.

articles.title: Two CIA agents reportedly killed in car crash in Mexican state of Chihuahua
articles.summary: Two CIA agents died in a car crash in Mexico's Chihuahua state. The incident raised questions about the presence of US officials in a law enforcement convoy. The presence of US officials in a law enforcement convoy raises questions about respect for Mexico's sovereignty.

articles.title: Lebanon war puts pregnant women at risk
articles.summary: Lebanon's healthcare system is strained due to the war, affecting thousands of displaced pregnant women. They are struggling to access medical services despite a temporary ceasefire. Lebanon’s healthcare system is under severe strain despite a temporary ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah.

articles.title: Iran says U.S. violated truce; non-committal on Pakistan talks
articles.summary: Iran accused the US of violating a truce, but was non-committal about talks with Pakistan. Pakistan's Information Minister said a formal response on Iran's participation was still awaited. As of 7:30 p. m.

articles.title: US-Iran Talks Are In Doubt As Ceasefire Nears An End
articles.summary: The US-Iran ceasefire is set to expire, casting doubt on ongoing talks. The ceasefire was established after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28, but its terms are now under review.

articles.title: 2 CIA Officers Killed In Mexico Vehicle Crash After Anti-Drug Op: Report
articles.summary: Two CIA officers were killed in a vehicle crash in Mexico after an anti-drug operation. They were returning from destroying a drug lab in Chihuahua. The incident occurred in a remote area, with details still emerging.

articles.title: 'होर्मुज में अस्थिरता का भारत पर सीधा असर', जर्मनी में रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने जताई चिंता
articles.summary: जर्मनी में रक्षा मंत्री राजनाथ सिंह ने कहा कि होर्मुज में अस्थिरता का भारत पर सीधा असर पड़ेगा। उन्होंने इस मुद्दे पर चिंता जताई। भारत के लिए यह एक महत्वपूर्ण चिंता का विषय है।

articles.title: 'बाहर निकलो, आप ट्रैफिक जाम करा रहे हैं': ट्रैफिक जाम पर महिला ने मंत्री को जमकर सुनाया, वायरल हो

articles.summary: पाकिस्तान ने यूएई से लिए क़र्ज़ को वापस लौटाना शुरू कर दिया है। इस बीच, सऊदी अरब ने पाकिस्तान को एक बड़ा क़र्ज़ दिया है, जिससे यूएई के साथ पाकिस्तान के संबंधों में तनाव की अटकलें तेज़ हो गई हैं।

articles.title: 'खरगे ने सारी हदें पार कर दीं', पीएम पर विवादित बयान को लेकर शाह का कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष पर हमला
articles.summary: केंद्रीय गृह मंत्री अमित शाह ने कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष मल्लिकार्जुन खरगे पर हमला किया। खरगे के प्रधानमंत्री पर विवादित बयान को लेकर शाह ने कहा कि उन्होंने सारी हदें पार कर दी हैं। यह बयान राजनीतिक विवाद को बढ़ा रहा है।

articles.summary: खाड़ी संघर्ष के कारण तारकोल के दाम दोगुने हो गए हैं। हिमाचल प्रदेश में सड़क की टारिंग पर ब्रेक लग गया है। Iran Israel war impact: खाड़ी संघर्ष से तारकोल के दाम दोगुने, हिमाचल प्रदेश में सड़क की टारिंग पर ब्रेक Amar Ujala।
